metaDescription: Madison Chinese Dance Academy - community classes, performances, and outreach. Purchase tickets or support our community.
heading: Madison Chinese Dance Academy
body: We dance to integrate Eastern and Western arts and cultures for a more harmonious world.

stats.label: Classes for beginner through advanced students

introHeading: A community academy for Chinese dance and culture
introBody: Madison Chinese Dance Academy gives students a place to train, perform, and grow through Chinese dance traditions and ballet technique. Our programs connect both families and audiences through classes, outreach, and the annual Splendid China performance.

featureCards.heading: Classes
featureCards.body: Beginner through advanced dance instruction for students of all ages.
featureCards.label: View classes

featureCards.heading: Splendid China
featureCards.body: Our annual concert brings traditional and contemporary Chinese dance to the stage.
featureCards.label: See Splendid China 2026

featureCards.heading: Gallery
featureCards.body: Browse moments from performances, community programs, and academy events.
featureCards.label: Open gallery

pathways.heading: Attend a performance
pathways.body: Get details for Splendid China 2026 and purchase tickets online.
pathways.label: Purchase tickets

pathways.heading: Support the academy
pathways.body: Help fund classes, costumes, rehearsal space, and community outreach.

pathways.heading: Get in touch
pathways.body: Ask about classes, performances, donations, or community programs.
